content_body: We have always gone to North Carolina to rent a cabin, but this is just as pretty and as nice. It was so nice to enjoy the fall foliage and the cool weather and the beautiful mountain stream. My 13 year old enjoyed playing in the river - still not too cold yet, and building a big bonfire in the fire pit with marshmallows. The cabin is so very nice and well-appointed. We loved the privacy and the stream. A nice piece of heaven to enjoy. The town of Blue Ridge and the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway were great to explore. We would love to come back for a more lengthy stay. Thank you for a very enjoyable stay. We appreciate your attention to details. They count a lot!
title: Enjoying the Fall Foliage In North Georgia
